title: Implement reversing alarm retrofit programme for warehouse forklifts
description: Following near-miss INC-2026-00001 in Warehouse B, a corrective action is required to retrofit audible reversing alarms on all powered industrial trucks operating within pedestrian-shared zones.
root_cause: Forklift FL-007 lacked an audible reversing alarm. Pre-use inspection checklist did not include alarm verification. Fleet maintenance schedule had no retrofit tracking for legacy units.
proposed_action: 1. Retrofit audible reversing alarms on all 12 warehouse forklifts. 2. Update pre-use inspection checklist to include alarm function test. 3. Add alarm status to fleet maintenance tracking system.
verification_method: Physical inspection of all 12 units confirming alarm installation and function. Audit of updated pre-use checklists over a 30-day period to confirm consistent completion.
effectiveness_criteria: Zero repeat near-miss incidents involving reversing forklifts in pedestrian zones over a 90-day monitoring period following completion.
